nodes.label: CLAUDE.md Project Guidance File
nodes.rationale: Provides project-specific instructions to Claude Code. Defines navigation rules: always read CODEBASE_INDEX.md first, prefer graphify query/path/explain over raw grep for codebase questions. Project is knowledge-hub, an early-stage knowledge management system under Apache 2.0.

nodes.label: graphify Knowledge Graph Tool
nodes.rationale: A tool that builds a persistent knowledge graph from code, docs, papers, and images. For codebase questions, graphify query/path/explain returns scoped subgraphs usually smaller than raw grep or full reports. Run graphify update after code changes to keep the graph current.

nodes.label: knowledge-hub Knowledge Management System
nodes.rationale: A knowledge management system in early setup phase with no source code, build system, or documentation beyond the LICENSE file and CLAUDE.md.
